slides.title: Good posture is *built, not willed*.
slides.sub: You can't simply remember to stand tall all day. A strong, mobile spine holds you up for you.

slides.title: Posture is strength, not willpower
slides.body: Sitting up straight on cue fades in minutes. Lasting posture *comes from* a back strong enough to hold it.

slides.title: What slumping adds up to
slides.body: Years of rounding forward *may strain* the neck and back. Over decades that quiet load can wear on you.

slides.title: Strengthen the back
slides.body: Rows, pulls and back work build the muscles that hold you upright. A strong back *makes posture* feel easy.

slides.title: Move and change shape often
slides.body: No single posture is perfect for hours. Shifting, stretching and standing often *keeps the spine* supple.

slides.title: Build a spine that lasts
slides.body: Posture is a byproduct of strength and movement. Tend to both and standing tall *may support* aging well.

slides.title: Build a back that *holds you up*.
slides.body: Vibe Health helps you track the strength and movement habits that keep your spine capable, all in one simple daily score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Good posture is built, not willed, and that's the freeing part. 🌿

You can't remember to stand tall all day, but a strong, mobile spine does it for you. Train your back, move often, and standing tall stops being a chore. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your strength and movement habits into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why Good Posture Comes From Strength, Not Willpower
